---
title: "Molecular Markers"
output: html_document
date: "2024-11-15"
params:
  outdir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/results/DM1
  mae_hdf5_path: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/h5MAE
  config_file: 'config.yml'
---

# Visualize results of linear modelling

## Parameters
```{r}
print(params)
outdir <- params$outdir

# If outdir not exists set to current dir
if (!dir.exists(outdir)){
    outdir <- getwd()
}
```


## Read data and metadata: MultiAssayExperiment
```{r}
require(SummarizedExperiment)
suppressWarnings(library(MultiAssayExperiment)) 


mae <- loadHDF5MultiAssayExperiment(
  dir = params$mae_hdf5_path, 
  prefix = 'mae')
```

## Config file
```{r}
config <- yaml::read_yaml(params$config_file)
```

## Assay selection
```{r}
assay_names <- config$experiment_names$general_selection
assay_names
```


## Phenotypic data
```{r}
pheno_df <- as.data.frame(colData(mae))
```


```{r}
library(patchwork)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggokabeito) # Okabe-Ito
library(ggpubr)
library(ggcorrplot)
```


## Functions for plotting features per disease group
```{r}
source_paths <- c(
  "../support_functions/Feature_plots.R",      # when running in Rstudio
  "Feature_plots.R"          # when running in Nextflow
)

for (path in source_paths) {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    source(path)
    break
  }
}
```


### DM1
#### RNA levels
```{r}
assay_name <- assay_names[grepl('RNAseq', assay_names)]

rna_plot_df <- prepare_boxplot_df(assay_name)

boxplot_per_group(rna_plot_df, 'ENSG00000149187', assay_name, 'CELF1', 'Log-scaled intensity', phenotype = 'observation.unit.identifier.crispr')
boxplot_per_group(rna_plot_df, 'ENSG00000048740', assay_name, 'CELF2', 'Log-scaled intensity', phenotype = 'observation.unit.identifier.crispr')
boxplot_per_group(rna_plot_df, 'ENSG00000159409', assay_name, 'CELF3', 'Log-scaled intensity', phenotype = 'observation.unit.identifier.crispr')
boxplot_per_group(rna_plot_df, 'ENSG00000161082', assay_name, 'CELF5', 'Log-scaled intensity', phenotype = 'observation.unit.identifier.crispr')
```

#### Protein levels
```{r}
assay_name <- assay_names[grepl('Prot', assay_names)]

protein_plot_df <- prepare_boxplot_df(assay_name)

boxplot_per_group(protein_plot_df, 'Q92879', assay_name, 'CELF1', 'Log-scaled intensity', phenotype = 'observation.unit.identifier.crispr')
boxplot_per_group(protein_plot_df, 'O95319', assay_name, 'CELF2', 'Log-scaled intensity', phenotype = 'observation.unit.identifier.crispr')
boxplot_per_group(protein_plot_df, 'Q5SZQ8', assay_name, 'CELF3', 'Log-scaled intensity', phenotype = 'observation.unit.identifier.crispr')

```

### DMPK expression
```{r}
assay_name <- assay_names[grepl('RNAseq', assay_names)]

rna_plot_df <- prepare_boxplot_df(assay_name)

df_input_dm <- rna_plot_df[rna_plot_df$phenotype %in% c('Diseased: DM1',
                                                  'Rescue: repeat excised CRISPR DM1',
                                                  'Healthy'),]


## Combine CTRLs
df_input_dm$sample.description <- ifelse(grepl("Control", df_input_dm$sample.description), "CTRL", df_input_dm$sample.description)
df_input_dm$sample.description <- ifelse(grepl("repeat excised", df_input_dm$sample.description), "CTRL", df_input_dm$sample.description)


## Re-factor to correct order
df_input_dm$sample.description <- factor(df_input_dm$sample.description, levels = c("CTRL", 
                                                                                    "DM1 patient 1 clone 1",
                                                                                    "DM1 patient 2 clone 1",
                                                                                    "DM1 patient 2 clone 2",
                                                                                    "DM1 patient 2 clone 3",
                                                                                    "DM1 patient 3 clone 1"))
## Contrasts to check                                                         
comparisons <- list(c("CTRL", "DM1 patient 1 clone 1"),
                    c("CTRL", "DM1 patient 2 clone 1"),
                    c("CTRL", "DM1 patient 2 clone 2"),
                    c("CTRL", "DM1 patient 2 clone 3"),
                    c("CTRL", "DM1 patient 3 clone 1"))


ggp <- boxplot_per_group(df_input_dm, 'ENSG00000104936', 'RNA-seq', 'DMPK (ENSG00000104936)', 'Log2-scaled intensity', 
                         phenotype = 'sample.description',
                         comparisons=comparisons)
ggp
ggsave(file.path(outdir, "RNA_DMPK_DM1_Sign.pdf"), ggp, height = 5)
```


### SIX5 expression
```{r}
ggp <- boxplot_per_group(df_input_dm, 'ENSG00000177045', 'RNA-seq', 'SIX5 (ENSG00000177045)', 'Log2-scaled intensity', 
                         phenotype = 'sample.description',
                         comparisons=comparisons)
ggp
ggsave(file.path(outdir, "RNA_SIX5_DM1_Sign.pdf"), ggp, height = 5)
```


## DMPK hypermethylation
```{r}
assay_name <- assay_names[grepl('EMseq', assay_names)]
df_input <- prepare_boxplot_df(assay_name)
DMPK_features <- c('chr19_45770966', 'chr19_45770745')

df_input_dm <- df_input[df_input$phenotype %in% c('Diseased: DM1',
                                                  'Rescue: repeat excised CRISPR DM1',
                                                  'Healthy'),]

lapply(DMPK_features, function(x) {
  ggp <- boxplot_per_group(df_input_dm, x, assay_name, 'DM1',  y_lab = 'beta-value', phenotype = 'observation.unit.identifier.crispr')
  ggsave(paste0('Meth_', x, '.pdf'), ggp, heigh = 5, width = 8)
})

```






## Session information
```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
